Stub functions for activity insights operations in the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
The code is a C header file that provides function declarations for managing and processing activity insights. It includes functions for recalculating statistics, initializing the system with the current time, processing sleep and minute data, and managing activity sessions. The functions are designed to handle time-based data, as indicated by the use of the `time_t` type for time parameters. The file includes the `stdint.h` library for standard integer types and a custom header `util/time/time.h`, which suggests that it relies on additional time-related utilities.

The functions in this file are intended to be used for tracking and analyzing physical activity data. They include operations for starting and pushing activity sessions, as well as handling notifications related to these sessions. The parameters for these functions include time, distance, calories, steps, and heart rate data, which are typical metrics for activity tracking. The file does not contain any implementation details, as all functions currently return immediately, indicating that this file serves as an interface for activity insights functionality.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdint.h`
- `util/time/time.h`
